product_updates.title: OpenAI alums have been quietly investing from a new, potentially $100M fund
product_updates.content: Zero Shot, a new venture capital fund with deep ties to OpenAI, is aiming to raise $100 million for its first fund. It has already written some checks.

product_updates.title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
product_updates.content: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.

product_updates.title: Iran threatens ‘Stargate’ AI data centers
product_updates.content: Iran said it will target U.S.-linked data centers with new missile strikes, as the war between the U.S. and Iran escalates.

product_updates.title: OpenAI’s vision for the AI economy: public wealth funds, robot taxes, and a four-day workweek
product_updates.content: OpenAI proposes taxes on AI profits, public wealth funds, and expanded safety nets to address job loss and inequality, blending redistribution with capitalism as policymakers debate AI’s economic impact.

product_updates.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications open: a chance for VC access, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K
product_updates.content: Nominate your startup, or one you know that deserves the spotlight, and finish the process by applying. Selected 200 have a chance at VC access, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K for Startup Battlefield 200. Applications close on May 27.

product_updates.title: How to use the new ChatGPT app integrations, including DoorDash, Spotify, Uber, and others
product_updates.content: Learn how to use Spotify, Canva, Figma, Expedia, and other apps directly in ChatGPT.

product_updates.title: Ticket savings of up to $500 this week for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
product_updates.content: Starting today, you have 5 days to save nearly $500 on your ticket to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. This offer disappears Friday, April 10, at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here to secure these low rates.

product_updates.title: Spain’s Xoople raises $130 million Series B to map the Earth for AI
product_updates.content: The company is also announcing a deal with L3Harris to build the sensors for Xoople's spacecraft.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The one piece of data that could actually shed light on your job and AI
technical_breakthroughs.content: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. technical_breakthroughs.title: AI is changing how small online sellers decide what to make
technical_breakthroughs.content: For years Mike McClary sold the Guardian LTE Flashlight, a heavy-duty black model, online through his small outdoor brand. The product, designed for brightness and durability, became one of his most popular items ever. Even after he stopped offering it around 2017, customers kept sending him emai…
